images.name: Who are the best 22s of all time in the SEC?
images.caption: As the countdown to kickoff reaches 22 days away, SEC Network analyst Chris Doering ranks the best players ever to suit up in the No. 22 jersey.

images.name: Lane Kiffin says Rebels ready to roll despite challenges
images.caption: With only four returning starters, Kiffin and Ole Miss face obstacles especially on defense, according to SEC Now analyst Chris Doering.

articles.description: With only four returning starters, Kiffin and Ole Miss face obstacles especially on defense, according to SEC Now analyst Chris Doering.

images.name: What message should Freeze send to Auburn QB Arnold?
images.caption: Because of a talented receiving core and a structured offense, SEC Now's Chris Doering explains how Hugh Freeze should make it clear to new QB Jackson Arnold that he doesn't have to win games for the Tigers by himself.

articles.description: Because of a talented receiving core and a structured offense, SEC Now's Chris Doering explains how Hugh Freeze should make it clear to new QB Jackson Arnold that he doesn't have to win games for the Tigers by himself.

images.name: Vandy's Diego Pavia predicts national title, says he's best QB in America
images.caption: Pavia tells Paul Finebaum he's not joking about Vanderbilt contending for it all and when asked who the best quarterback in the nation is, he replies: 'You're lookin' at him.'

images.name: Chris Doering explains going 'all in' on LSU
images.caption: SEC Network analyst Doering joins The Paul Finebaum Show and goes into why he thinks the Tigers are the frontrunner going into the season, and what QB DJ Lagway needs to do to excel at Florida.

videos.description: Indiana kicker Griffin Oakes had missed his first two field goals of the game, but makes this one from 20 yards out in overtime to give the Hoosiers a 24-21 victory over Michigan State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Indiana hits field goal to beat Michigan State in OT) 2016/10/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Indiana hits field goal to beat Michigan State in OT

videos.description: Michigan State gets Indiana to bite on the play-action fake and Tyler O'Connor hits R.J. Shelton, who dives into the end zone for the 86-yard touchdown to give the Spartans a 7-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Spartans run play action to perfection with 86-yard touchdown) 2016/10/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Spartans run play action to perfection with 86-yard touchdown
